use_cases: Displaying grouped content with consistent card styling
Creating feature sections with title, description, and content regions
Building product cards, pricing cards, or pricing tables
Structuring dashboard widgets and data display panels
Composing layout sections in landing pages or dashboards
ai_summary: A foundational shadcn/ui Card component system providing composable Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter subcomponents with minimalist styling using standard Tailwind classes. Designed as a versatile content container for flexible UI composition across any layout or industry application.
